description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a sleek, contoured double-cutaway body finished in glossy black. The front features a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, a five-way selector switch, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone. The neck is made of wood with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard, marked with dot inlays, and is bolted onto the body. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, typical of Stratocaster-style guitars. The back of the guitar shows a metallic neck plate and a rear cavity cover, both secured with screws. The overall design is ergonomic and iconic, suitable for a wide range of musical genres and urban street performances.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three pickups, and a wooden neck with six inline tuners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, white pickguard, three pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body thickness and the protruding tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black back, metallic neck plate, and rear cavity cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness and the edge of the pickguard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Stratocaster contour
